title: Sign up page
description: Build the user registration page at /signup with a centered card form containing name, email, and password fields. On success, store the JWT and redirect to /dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Page renders a centered card with the app name, name/email/password fields, and a Sign Up button
Form shows inline validation errors for: empty name, invalid email format, password shorter than 8 characters
Submit button shows a loading state while the API call is in progress
Successful signup stores the JWT in localStorage and redirects to /dashboard
API error (e.g. duplicate email) is shown as a toast or error message below the form
Page includes a link to /login for existing users

steps.details: Create src/web/src/pages/SignupPage.tsx. Use shadcn/ui Card, CardHeader, CardContent components for the layout. Center on screen with min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center.

steps.description: Build the form with React Hook Form and Zod
steps.details: Define a Zod schema: z.object({ name: z.string().min(1, 'Name is required'), email: z.string().email('Invalid email'), password: z.string().min(8, 'Password must be at least 8 characters') }). Use useForm with zodResolver. Render Input components for each field with error messages below each input. Show a loading spinner in the Submit button while isSubmitting is true.

In the onSubmit handler: call register(name, email, password) from apiService. On success: call auth.login(response.access_token, response.user) from AuthContext, navigate to /dashboard. On error: show error message (e.g. 'An account with this email already exists') using state variable displayed below the submit button.

steps.description: Add link to login and verify UI with Playwright
steps.details: Add 'Already have an account? Log in' link pointing to /login. Take a Playwright screenshot of the signup page. Verify the form renders correctly on mobile (375px). Verify form validation messages appear on submit with empty fields.

technicalNotes: Use useAuth() hook from AuthContext for the login() function
Disable the submit button while isSubmitting to prevent double-submit
Show generic error message on unexpected API errors, specific messages for known errors (duplicate email)
